generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor measuring ambient thermal conditions in building spaces"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensor detecting presence of occupants in building areas"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance LightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Light sensor measuring illumination levels for visual comfort analysis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from building sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Occupancy status data for building spaces"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance LightData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ambient light level data for visual comfort assessment"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric, spatial, and functional data model of the building infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance BIMAuthoringTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM authoring tools for generating and editing building models"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMModelCreationService
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT connectivity and sensor data ingestion"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management and device registry"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for high-fidelity 3D visualization of building systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringMDE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering techniques for automated transformation and DT evolution"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMTransformationService, ContinuousEvolutionService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous monitoring of building parameters using sensor data streams"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureInsight, OccupancyInsight, LightInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy optimization, visual comfort, and non-visual health effects"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyUsageInsight, OccupantComfortInsight, MaintenanceSchedulingInsight, LightingControlAction, HVACControlAction
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building systems using Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance BIMTransformationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated transformation of BIM models into runtime artifacts using DSR methodology"
    DTDFVocab:provides RuntimeArtifactsInsight
]

instance ContinuousEvolutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous evolution of digital twin through service extensions and ODTE metric validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ODTEValidationInsight
]

instance EnergyUsageInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights on building energy consumption patterns for optimization"
]

instance OccupantComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights related to thermal and visual comfort for occupant well-being"
]

instance MaintenanceSchedulingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance recommendations based on system performance metrics"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of building systems for facility management"
]

instance RuntimeArtifactsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Runtime artifacts generated from BIM model transformation"
]

instance ODTEValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation results from ODTE metrics for digital twin accuracy"
]

instance LightingControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of lighting levels based on occupancy and light sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HVACControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Regulation of HVAC system valves based on temperature and occupancy data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LightingController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator controlling lighting systems in building spaces"
]

instance HVACValve : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator regulating heating, ventilation, and air conditioning systems"
]

instance BIMModelCreationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for creating and maintaining BIM models using authoring tools"
    DTDFVocab:provides BIMModelInsight
]

instance TemperatureInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature monitoring insight"
]

instance OccupancyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy monitoring insight"
]

instance LightInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time light level monitoring insight"
]

instance BIMModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "BIM model insights for design and construction"
]

instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital Twin environment for the building infrastructure Living Lab case study"
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, OccupancySensor, LightSensor, LightingController, HVACValve, BIMModel, EclipseHono, EclipseDitto, UnrealEngine5, ModelDrivenEngineeringMDE, BIMAuthoringTools, RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, InteractiveVisualizationService, BIMTransformationService, ContinuousEvolutionService, EnergyUsageInsight, OccupantComfortInsight, MaintenanceSchedulingInsight, VisualizationInsight, RuntimeArtifactsInsight, ODTEValidationInsight, LightingControlAction, HVACControlAction, BIMModelCreationService, TemperatureInsight, OccupancyInsight, LightInsight, BIMModelInsight
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands sent from the Digital Twin to BCS actuators (e.g., adjusting lighting levels or HVAC settings) via Eclipse Hono and Ditto."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization between physical assets and digital counterparts with sensor data updates and control command execution occurring within milliseconds to seconds."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized DT Framework orchestrating BIM data, Hono/Ditto data exchange, Unreal Engine visualization, and modular services for holistic building management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the entire building life cycle from design through construction, operation, and refurbishment phases."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to measure synchronization accuracy between physical and virtual counterparts."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware for real-time data exchange."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Standardized interfaces enabling integration with external systems (e.g., energy management platforms) via Eclipse Hono and Ditto."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "BIM standards for semantic modeling and standardized extension points for service integration."
]
